# What's For Dinner

> AI-powered meal planner that generates personalized weekly meal plans with recipes and a grocery list in 30 seconds.

## What It Does

What's For Dinner is a meal planning app at whatsfordinner.fit. You tell it what your family eats, what to avoid (allergies, dietary restrictions, dislikes), your household size, and your budget. It uses AI to generate a complete weekly meal plan with full recipes and a consolidated grocery list, delivered to your inbox every Sunday.

## What Makes It Different

- Generates complete meal plans with full recipes AND a grocery list — not just meal suggestions
- Personalized to dietary needs: keto, vegan, vegetarian, gluten-free, halal, allergies, picky eaters
- Plans are ready in 30 seconds, not hours of manual planning
- Portions and grocery quantities auto-adjust to household size (1-6+ people)
- Real, practical meals with common ingredients — not restaurant-level complexity
- Free 3-day plan available with no credit card required

## Who It's For

- Busy families tired of the daily "what's for dinner?" question
- People with dietary restrictions who struggle to find compatible meal ideas
- Budget-conscious cooks who want to reduce food waste with planned grocery lists
- Anyone who wants to eat well without spending hours planning and searching for recipes

## Pricing

- Free: 3-day meal plan with recipes and a grocery list (no account required)
- Monthly: $7.99/month for weekly 7-day plans, regenerations, and email delivery
- Yearly: $59.99/year (save 37%)

## Free Tools

- "What Should I Cook Tonight?" quiz: answer 4 quick questions, get a dinner recommendation
- Calorie Calculator: find your daily calorie target
- Dinner Generator: random dinner ideas filtered by cuisine, diet, and time
- Recipe Library: 800+ recipes browsable by meal type, diet, and tags
